Class ChatServerImpl.ServerThreadForClient

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Thread
es.ubu.lsi.server.ChatServerImpl.ServerThreadForClient
All Implemented Interfaces:
Runnable
Enclosing class:
ChatServerImpl
private class ChatServerImpl.ServerThreadForClient extends Thread
One instance of this thread will run for each client.
Author:
http://www.dreamincode.net, Raúl Marticorena, Joaquin P. Seco
